testcase.name: test_get_public_branding

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('nom' in {'afficher_profiremanager': True, 'logo_url': 'data:image/png;base64,...', 'nom_service': 'Service Incendie de Démonstration'} or 'id' in {'afficher_profiremanager': True, 'logo_url': 'data:image/png;base64,...', 'nom_service': 'Service Incendie de Démonstration'})

testcase.failure: tests/test_regression_rbac.py:276: in test_get_public_branding assert "nom" in data or "id" in data E AssertionError: assert ('nom' in {'afficher_profiremanager': True, 'logo_url': 'data:image/png;base64,...', 'nom_service': 'Service Incendie de Démonstration'} or 'id' in {'afficher_profiremanager': True, 'logo_url': 'data:image/png;base64,...', 'nom_service': 'Service Incendie de Démonstration'})
